bullets.fact: They’re recording a special episode in Silicon Valley
bullets.quote: brought you down here to Silicon Valley to record our 10 year anniversary holiday special
bullets.speaker: Ben Gilbert

bullets.fact: Recording set in Google’s original garage office
bullets.quote: This is Google's first office right here. They gave it to us for the day
bullets.speaker: Ben Gilbert

bullets.fact: Episode will analyze why Acquired succeeded where most podcasts don’t
bullets.quote: to unpack why Acquired worked when 99% of podcasts do not
bullets.speaker: Ben Gilbert

bullets.fact: They brought in Michael Lewis to dissect the show’s mechanics
bullets.quote: Someone who distills complexity into simplicity… Michael Lewis
bullets.speaker: Ben Gilbert
